testcase.name: @stynx-web/angular-auth > renders login redirect and completes the active browser callback URL
@stynx-web/angular-auth > renders logout and permission directive behaviour through TestBed
@stynx-web/angular-auth > auth guard redirects to the login route when no session is active
@stynx-web/angular-auth > auth guard allows active sessions
@stynx-web/angular-auth > auth guard uses the default login route when no override is configured
@stynx-web/angular-auth > switches tenant and updates both session state and tenant context
@stynx-web/angular-auth > handles inactive login, refresh failure, login redirect, logout, and permission helpers
@stynx-web/angular-auth > clears inactive callback variants and preserves state tenant during refresh
@stynx-web/angular-auth > resolves tenant from callback URL, refreshes active sessions, and rejects tenant switch without a token
@stynx-web/angular-auth > parses JWT payloads and persists refresh tokens in storage and cookies
@stynx-web/angular-auth > uses browser globals for refresh storage defaults and preserves cookie directives exactly
@stynx-web/angular-auth > permission guard denies and allows based on session permissions
@stynx-web/angular-auth > ships the permission-denied component and default route provider
@stynx-web/angular-auth > has-permission directive renders only when the session grants the permission
@stynx-web/angular-auth > has-permission directive rerenders on active stream changes and array inputs
@stynx-web/angular-auth > has-permission directive renders the default empty requirement before inputs arrive
@stynx-web/angular-auth > calls auth backend endpoints with normalized URLs and headers
@stynx-web/angular-auth > adapts OIDC calls and redirect/logout components to session methods
@stynx-web/angular-auth > resolves configured hosted auth action links without guessing provider URLs
@stynx-web/angular-auth > opens hosted auth actions through location assignment or a new tab
@stynx-web/angular-auth > reports unavailable and invalid hosted auth action configuration
@stynx-web/angular-auth > login redirect passes no callback URL when no browser window is available
@stynx-web/angular-auth > refresh token storage tolerates missing browser storage globals
@stynx-web/angular-auth > refreshes and logs out inactive sessions without backend calls
@stynx-web/angular-auth > resolves tenant ids from token claims and rejects missing tenant context
@stynx-web/angular-auth > hasAllPermissions returns false when any required permission is missing (kills MethodExpression .every → .some at src/session.service.ts:119)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > hasAnyPermissions returns true when any required permission is granted (kills MethodExpression .some → .every at src/session.service.ts:124)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > resolveTenantId rejects empty-string tenant claim (kills EqualityOperator `> 0` → `>= 0` at src/session.service.ts:138)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > parseJwtPayload returns parsed payload for exactly-2-part JWT (no signature) — kills EqualityOperator `parts.length < 2` → `<= 2`
@stynx-web/angular-auth > parseJwtPayload preserves URL-safe base64 chars - and _ in payload decoding (kills StringLiteral mutations on the replace patterns at src/jwt.ts:30)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > cookie write produces directives `Path=` + `SameSite=` + `Secure` exactly (kills StringLiteral at storage.ts:95-101)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > cookie clear emits `Max-Age=0` directive (kills StringLiteral at storage.ts:89)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > cookie read trims surrounding whitespace from entries (kills MethodExpression on .trim at storage.ts:75)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > cookie read returns null when cookie source is empty (kills StringLiteral at storage.ts:72)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > applyBundle sets state.active === true (kills BooleanLiteral mutation at src/session.service.ts:148)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > parseJwtPayload — atob/TextDecoder environment toggles > uses the manual decoder when atob is undefined (kills ConditionalExpression on `typeof atob === "function"`)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > parseJwtPayload — atob/TextDecoder environment toggles > uses the manual decoder when atob is not a function (kills EqualityOperator on the type check)

@stynx-web/angular-auth > parseJwtPayload — atob/TextDecoder environment toggles > returns null when manual-decoder encounters invalid base64 (kills ConditionalExpression/BlockStatement at jwt.ts:16-17)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > parseJwtPayload — atob/TextDecoder environment toggles > uses the latin-1 fallback when TextDecoder is undefined (kills ConditionalExpression at jwt.ts:33)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > parseJwtPayload — atob/TextDecoder environment toggles > returns null for a 1-part token (kills EqualityOperator `parts.length < 2` → `<= 2`)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > parseJwtPayload — atob/TextDecoder environment toggles > parses a 2-part JWT (no signature) — kills `parts.length < 2` mutation
@stynx-web/angular-auth > parseJwtPayload — atob/TextDecoder environment toggles > preserves URL-safe base64 - and _ chars during decode (kills Regex mutations on the replace patterns)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > parseJwtPayload — atob/TextDecoder environment toggles > handles base64url with no padding (kills ConditionalExpression at jwt.ts:31 `normalized.length % 4 === 0`)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > normalizePermissions — array filter precision > filters string-only values from a mixed array (kills filter type-guard mutations)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > normalizePermissions — array filter precision > returns [] when payload is null (kills BlockStatement at jwt.ts:54-55)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > normalizePermissions — array filter precision > returns [] when raw is not a string or array (e.g. number)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > RefreshTokenStorage — environment toggles > session-storage mode with no sessionStorage available returns no-op
@stynx-web/angular-auth > RefreshTokenStorage — environment toggles > cookie mode with no document available returns null on read and no-op on write

@stynx-web/angular-auth > OIDC adapter — URL parameter strip + base fallback > sanitizes the current URL by stripping all OIDC redirect params (kills the StringLiteral array entries at oidc-client.adapter.ts:41)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > OIDC adapter — URL parameter strip + base fallback > encodePlaceholder returns empty string when value is null (kills StringLiteral at oidc-client.adapter.ts:19)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > OIDC adapter — URL parameter strip + base fallback > falls back to "https://stynx.local" base when browserLocation has no origin (kills LogicalOperator)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > OIDC adapter — URL parameter strip + base fallback > openHostedAction routes new-tab links via window.open with noopener+noreferrer (kills StringLiteral)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > OIDC adapter — URL parameter strip + base fallback > openHostedAction routes default links via location.assign (kills BlockStatement on the new-tab branch)
@stynx-web/angular-auth > HttpAuthBackend — apiBaseUrl trailing-slash normalize (kills Regex at http-auth.backend.ts:9) > treats apiBaseUrl with trailing slash identically to without
